text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Y-yeah, I'm fine! I'm, um... just a little
hungry...
I'M GONNA GIVE TODAY MY AAAALLL!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that felt good! Nothing like some good ol'
yelling to clear your mind of gloomy feelings!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Clear your mind... of gloomy thoughts...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: What...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
WHAT DO I HAVE TO DO TO BECOME COOLER
AND MORE DEPENDABLE?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's still hung up on what happened at
the amusement park with Biko Pegasus and Hishi
Akebono a while back.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! You wanna be cool and dependable?
That's such a great goal! You're living life to the
full!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea how long it will take to achieve or
even how I'd make it happen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But since I've set my sights on that goal, I'm not
going to give up on it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Well, that's easy, Chiyo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Just go and observe people you think are reliable!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I guess you're right—there's no one more reliable
than a doctor! They make your stomachaches go
away and stuff, after all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
E-exactly! Even in TV shows, you always see these
cool doctors who enter the scene and say
reassuring things like, "I'll save you no matter
what!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hm? Hey, look over there.

text_block_list.name: Patient
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for all your help, Doctor.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on being discharged... To think I
once thought you wouldn't recover. I owe you my
deepest apologies for my thoughtless comments.

text_block_list.name: Patient
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to apologize. Your honesty is
what made me trust you. I could tell you were
sincere.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Getting discharged is definitely something
to celebrate! What great news for both of them!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Telling a patient you're not sure if they'll
recover, though? That doesn't exactly make the
doctor seem very reliable... and yet...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, sorry! Let's keep going!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you dunno what this flower is?! Why not? I
thought teachers knew everything!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
There are a lot of things I don't know. Everyone's
the same. What do you do when you don't know
something?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Umm... I look it up and study it!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. I'll read up on this flower so I can tell you
all about it the next time we see one. Now we
both have a reason to study hard!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... That reminds me of the time I made
sakura mochi with my teacher a long time ago...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Was your teacher a master patissier of
Japanese desserts?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, they were actually really bad at cooking, but
they did their very best to research different
recipes for me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And that made me really happy...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I get it now... Being dependable must mean...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right! Where should we go next?
choice_data_list:
It might be time to head back—we do have
training tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What?! But we were just getting started! I bet you
still wanna keep going too, right, Chiyo? I mean,
you haven't found your answer yet!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I think I'm good! Thank you for your
help, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I did... Or I guess I should say I realized that I
might've been on the right track all along...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'm still an unreliable mess, and I'm
extremely far away from my goal...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But now I know that as long as I keep on this
path, I'll become the person I want to be
eventually.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I just have to do what I do best and work my butt
off!
choice_data_list: Just be careful not to overdo it.
Just be careful not to overdo it.
That's what I like to hear!
That's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I just have to do what I do best and work my butt
off!
choice_data_list: Just be careful not to overdo it.
Just be careful not to overdo it.
That's what I like to hear!
That's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Y-yeah. I need to make sure I don't repeat my
mistakes from the amusement park.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best not to do more than my best so I
can do my best!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: More than your best to... Wait, what?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You lost me there, but I know you can do it,
Chiyo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All right! Then let's start off on the right foot and
run back to the academy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! You wanna start by putting your all
into your usual training too, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaall righty, then! I can help you with that!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O & Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O, G-O!
Tickezo, G-O!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I end up rushing to chase after them as
they sprint back to the academy at full speed!
